## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 24, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Alex Mercer_, May 20, 2026, 1/5: "Absolutely avoid this app, it deletes the important notes you have created, out of nowhere, absolutely avoid this app, I have no idea if it's a bug or if someone who manages our information enjoys trolling us by deleting the most important notes. Definitely choose another app."
            2. _Łukasz Daniluk_, Feb 24, 2026, 2/5: "I have just downloaded it and first experience is very buggy. In the list of the Notebooks the default one displays without any cover at all and could not open it, had to restart the app, and when I wanted to change the cover to my photo it took me to a page that says it yearly costs 4 NaN instead of 49 PLN. This bad first experience has completely snuffed any will to try out this app."
            3. _Ani Gopinathan Pillai_, Jul 15, 2026, 3/5: "I used to adore this app... until it got frustrating. Now it just crashes every time I open it ... I posted this review at least 3 times in 3 years and still the app just keeps on crashing on me when I need it most..."
